text: In this place of glass, light, and geometric rigor, I sense a certain sterility but also the anticipation of collective purpose. The room beyond the transparent wall holds rows of seats and glowing screens, as if ideas are waiting to be shared or born. Stepping further in, I am greeted by the language of experimentation—R+D, innovation layered atop color and code. An artful chaos fills the air, celebrating the friction between uncertainty and invention. I feel curiosity growing stronger within me, my mind eager to join this dance of ambiguity and possibility.
